response: Braces are medical devices used to correct misaligned teeth and jaws. They work by applying gentle pressure to the teeth, which helps them move into proper positions over time. While braces can make it more difficult to chew or speak, they do not manipulate gravity at will. The concept of manipulating gravity is not relevant to the function of braces. The idea that people with braces can "manipulate gravity" is a misunderstanding of how braces work. Braces rely on mechanical forces, not gravitational forces, to move teeth. Therefore, people with braces cannot manipulate gravity at will. The last word of my response is **weakness**.
